title: Help, I Shrunk My Teacher
original_title: Hilfe, ich hab meine Lehrerin geschrumpft
overview: Already having a hard time adjusting at his new school, things take a turn for the bizarre for eleven year old Felix when he accidentally shrinks his strict principal to only fifteen centimetres in height!
